Seungbeen Lee

I consider advanced and sophisticated reward model in new AI brain.

Research Interest

Hello. I'm interested in AI as a social agent. I like new experiences. I believe that technology opens up new needs.

- NLP
- Social Simulation
- Reinforcement Learning
- Data Visualization
